title: Trust | Your Product
description: A platform-site starter trust page for product credibility, team links, and key context.
heroTitle: Keep product trust signals in one easy-to-scan place
heroText: Use this route for the shortest version of product trust: team context, public links, and the essentials someone wants before starting a conversation.

cards.title: Product context
cards.text: Use this card for product category, team shape, or the operational environment the platform fits best.

cards.title: Implementation confidence
cards.text: Summarise the delivery, support, documentation, or system-thinking strengths that reduce risk.

cards.title: Public profile links
cards.text: Use this area for docs, changelog, support channels, public roadmap, or other trust-building links.

cards.title: Next-step contact
cards.text: Keep one clear contact or onboarding path visible instead of many weak options.
